title: Pokemon ORAS Alpha Sapphire - WiFi Link Battle + Mega Diancie
description:
This is a special video for my friend, Procastinator25 who haven't decided whether to put Diancie in his team. He also wants to know how good she is (eventhough it's genderless.)

So there you go, friend.


The video quality is quite poor since I use camcorder to record this and not 3DS Capture as it's not available in my country. 


PS: I freaking love RSE/ORAS Battle Frontier Theme! GameFreak, GIVE US BATTLE FRONTIER!!!! *shakes fist*
